location: San Francisco Bay Area + couple-hour drive

dogs.name: Moira
dogs.description: Moira is a rescue from the Bakersfield shelter, July 2025. They labeled her as a greyhound/lab mix. Moira is estimated to be 1 year and is 50 pounds. She is a happy pup! She loves people and other dogs. Moira loves to run and play and enjoys chasing the other dogs in foster care. She knows some basic commands “sit” & “paw”. She is crate trained and house trained. She is a little jumpy and needs more training with this. Moira likes taking walks is good with all she meets. Update: DNA for Moira 50% Doberman Pinscher 26.2% Australian Cattle Dog 15% Siberian Husky 8.8% Border Collie

dogs.name: Okapi
dogs.breed: American Pit Bull Terrier / Australian Cattle Dog
dogs.description: Pupdate: Okapi had surgery on her leg Wednesday. The surgery went very well. Pins were insered in her knee area to correct the growth plate and another broken bone. Her recovery time is approx. 4 to 6 weeks. In 4 weeks, x-rays will be re-taken to see how the bones are healing. We are looking for a temporary foster home to care for Okapi during this time. Okapi is about 4 months old. She is a mix of a Herding breed/Pit Bull who has beaten incredible odds just to be here today. Before arriving from Bakersfield, Okapi and her sister, Panda, were tiny puppies suffering from pneumonia, They watched nearly their entire litter disappear. Four siblings died in the shelter, two more died in foster care, and another was euthanized at the hospital. Against all odds, Okapi and Panda survived. Today, their journey took another heartbreaking turn. Okapi was found to have a severly fractured growth pla

dogs.name: *JENA
dogs.color: Black - with Brown, Red, Golden, Orange or Chestnut
dogs.description: A sweet and petite dog. Walks easily on leash. She loves affection. She is currently receiving medicated baths for hair loss. This little girl recently met some social dogs at our shelter and did fine. She wasn’t ready to play, but we hope that as she gets more experience in our shelter playgroups, she’ll be ready to show us her silly side with other dogs. Looking for a buddy for your dog? Bring him/her to the shelter for a meet and greet and see if we`re a match! Check out her playgroup video here: To meet me, visit the Bradshaw Animal Shelter Tuesday-Sunday, Noon - 5:00 pm, Wednesdays, Noon - 6:00 pm. All adoptions are on a first-come, first-served basis. To help expedite the meet and greet process, please make note of my Animal ID number, and those of other dogs you might be interested in meeting. Be sure to bring your ID with you, too. We are located at 3839 Bradshaw Road, Sacramento
dogs.shelterName: Sacramento County Animal Care (Bradshaw Animal Shelter)

dogs.name: *LAS VEGAS
dogs.description: Las Vegas doesn`t believe in doing anything halfway—especially when it comes to fetch. This handsome Cattle Dog is all business once the ball comes out, locking onto his mission with the laser focus and determination the breed is famous for. The best part? He`s happy to hand the toy right back because, to him, the greatest reward is watching you throw it again. This playful, intelligent boy is looking for a home that appreciates everything that makes Cattle Dogs so special. He`s active, eager to engage, and happiest when he has a job to do. Whether it`s a game of fetch, learning new skills, or joining you on outdoor adventures, Las Vegas is ready to be your enthusiastic partner. Like many of his breed, his affection is genuine but practical. He`ll happily spend time with his people, but don`t expect a couch potato—this guy would much rather be interacting, playing, and sharing life`s adv
dogs.shelterName: Sacramento County Animal Care (Bradshaw Animal Shelter)

dogs.name: Koda
dogs.breed: Australian Cattle Dog / German Shepherd Dog
dogs.description: Walks and fetch - please!! This is what he lives for! Koda would be GREAT in a 1-2 person home with someone who works from home with no kids. He gets very anxious about staying alone and always likes to be with his person. He s 69 pounds of love and brilliance and enjoys riding in the car for any amount of time, long walks, fetch and swimming in the river. He has trouble getting shots at the vet and so we are overdue. Koda has had 5 week behavioral training at Ridgeside K-9 in April 2025 and is a quick learner. He really lives for playing fetch with a stick or a ball but gets snippy with the vet and getting put into his crate

dogs.name: Lola
dogs.description: It was a gift I was planning to take it to Mexico but plans changed and I was unable to make the trip, she is the best puppy she is very active and she know commands like sit, spin, jump, crate and wait. She is 8 weeks but unfortunately I cannot longer have her in my apartment. I’m trying to find her a home that will take care of her and will seek for her too. :)

dogs.name: SERGIO
dogs.description: Sergio has participated in shelter playgroups and may enjoy a compatible canine friend in his new home. Looking for a buddy for your dog? Bring him/her to the shelter for a meet and greet and see if we`re a match! Check out his playgroup video here: To meet me, visit the Bradshaw Animal Shelter Tuesday-Sunday, Noon - 5:00 pm, Wednesdays, Noon - 6:00 pm. All adoptions are on a first-come, first-served basis. To help expedite the meet and greet process, please make note of my Animal ID number, and those of other dogs you might be interested in meeting. Be sure to bring your ID with you, too. We are located at 3839 Bradshaw Road, Sacramento. I look forward to getting to know you!

dogs.name: Charlie
dogs.color: White - with Tan, Yellow or Fawn
dogs.description: Charlie is that fun pup and perfect for the perfect doggy commercial. She knows sit and down and loves training. Food and treat oriented, Charlie has that magic ingredient dog trainers love - will to please! She is a lap dog and loves to cuddle but also a great outdoor companion. She is a fetch doggy and great at retrieving her ball. Her favorite pasttime is jogging with her foster mom's sister and also great at hiking and a water dog, too. Charlie is great on the leash and not a puller. She is friendly will all dogs, kids and even cats! You cannot dream up a better companion than Charlie. Only one year old and a compact 35 pounds. She's had all her shots and spayed, too. Give us call today and find out about Reunion Rescue and Animals First foster to adopt program along with our lifesaving holistic system that keeps dogs out of the vet office.

dogs.name: Happy
dogs.description: Happy is the sweetest boy. We pulled him at the last minute when he was about to be euthanized. Proved to be kid - cat - dog - people friendly, Happy was fostered to adopt to a person who mis-represented themselves to our rescue and Happy was the one who suffered. He was brought to the person as a perfect little man, but when we were able to get him back, he didn't even know his name! We think the person just left him on his own in the backyard..TOTALLY AGAINST REUNION RESCUE REGULATIONS!! The person in question even kept the toys and gift box filled with doggy starter leashes, collars, halters, balls, a Topple toy and Kongs among other things. We are looking for a great loving home where Happy can learn to be happy again. He is in foster care and loves going to the beach. Reunion Rescue has re-furnished him with new halters, collars, leash and toys. This time, we are looking for a home

dogs.name: Howdy
dogs.description: This dog`s adoption fee has been generously sponsored! Yee Howdy, y`all! Meet Howdy, yer new beliked pardner who`s got a baker`s dozen of love to provide you with. This little lady is a 1-year-old Cattle Dog mix, so you just know she`s always up for some doggone fun including playtime, goin` fer a jog, or just entertaining herself. She`s here to be your number one cowhand with every passing day. Howdy`s looking for a home full of fun, love, and snuggles. She adores laying her big head in yer lap for pets and whatnot. Now, of course, she`d like you to get here soon -- not latish -- so she can talk a donkey`s hind leg off with you. Howdy`s ready to lasso your heart; do you feel the tug? Come meet her today - she`s two whoops and a holler away!

dogs.name: Koa
dogs.description: 7:15 M 44 Are you looking for a dog friend for your dog? Then Koa is your man! He absolutely loves other dogs and enjoys playtime. He is incredibly dog social with dogs big or small. SPECIAL FOSTER or home NEEDED for a very special pup. Koa is a cattle dog mix, who is two years old. In his foster home, he is mostly confident, although he can still get spooked by sudden movements and loud noises. He loves to play constantly with other dogs. He can be too much for small dogs, but he does well with confident, developed younger dogs. Koa would do best in a country or rural area that is quiet without too much stimulation. Unfortunately, outside of the home, he is insecure. We are seeking a home or foster who is experienced in helping a very shy and anxious dog come out of his shell and has the patience and time to work with him on building his confidence. Koa has become very affectionate with

dogs.name: Mariah
dogs.description: Mariah is a very sweet, playful, and super friendly Cattle Dog/Jack Russel Terrier mix looking for her forever home. There is never a dull moment with her in the home. She is always looking play, cuddle, and be the center of attention. She's about 2 years old, weighs 40 pounds, and is full of joy and happiness. Mariah has been spayed, microchipped, and fully vaccinated. She is very smart, energetic, and sometimes goofy - bringing smiles to anyone that meets her. She is ready to be in a forever home with a loving family and eager to go out on adventures and have a fulfilling dog life. If you are looking for an active dog that is great with adults, children, and other dogs, then Mariah is the dog for you.

dogs.name: Mickey
dogs.description: Mickey is a very sweet, playful and affectionate 3-year old fostered Cattle Dog mix looking for his forever home. He is full of energy and loves to be the center of attention. He enjoys being around other dogs and people, he's great in the car, and he is crate-trained. Mickey has been neutered and microchipped, and he is all up to date on his vaccinations. He would be a great addition to any family looking for a sweet and fun dog to spend quality time with.
